text: Narrated Ya'ia bin Murrah: that the Messenger of Allsh (SAW) said: i is from me, and | am from Husain. Alh loves whoever loves |Hissain . Hiusain is a Siot among the Asbat * [Asbat, plural of Sibt: A great tribe. Meaning, A+ Huain) would have many offspring, such that they would become a great fribe. And this has indeed ocourred. See Tuhfat Al-Ahwadhi (4/341) 1 Grade: Hasan (Darussalam) Reference :Jami atTirmidhi 3775
